docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR FEB-15-2005 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-11-2005 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff Pat Lakey, appearing in Propria Persona. Case is ordered Dismissed without prejudice at the request of the Plaintiff in Propria Persona. Court ordered sanctions previoiulsy issued in the case vacated. Proceedings reported by: Janet Pond. (212)
